method: Workbench MCP api_search + pak path survey
workbenchFailReason: MCP daemon not reachable — scripts/mod/mcp-call.sh api_search 'map icon atlas UI' hung >30s with no JSON response (Workbench not warm / operator offline). Proceeding per spec L1 redraw path.

searches.notes: No pak paths returned; operator must run bash scripts/mod/tbd-dev-bootstrap.sh for live extraction

keys.redrawRationale: A3/Eden gabled house with chimney — distinct from civic church silhouette
Church steeple + cross — Reforger map civic/chapel landmark
Red barn X-door + silo — Eden farm compound
Twin smokestacks + sawtooth roof — factory distinct from warehouse
Striped awning shopfront — retail vs residential roofline
Quonset arch + tri-fold door — airfield hangar (T-152.5 defers airfield compose)
Earth berm pillbox with gun slit — military fortification
Lattice radio mast + guy wires — not lighthouse cylinder
Barracks parapet + red star insignia + perimeter fence
Deck bridge with arch truss + water tint — distinct from building footprints
Twin crenellated towers + gate — Everon castle landmarks
Red-white banded tower + beacon rays — coastal nav aid (M1 pin)
Lean-to shed with tool marks — small outbuilding
Stacked ISO corrugated containers — port/depot
GP tent with ridge pole + peg lines — field camp
Collapsed jagged walls + rubble — damaged structures
Roll-up door bay + vehicle wheel hint
Neutral flat-roof block — fallback when class unknown
Compact circle + star badge for center overlay @ BUILDING_BADGE_MIN_ZOOM
Compact pillbox berm in circle — bunker center badge
Compact antenna mast in circle — tower center badge

gaps: No extracted Reforger PNG dimensions — MCP unavailable; all art source:redraw
Tree/veg/prop glyphs unchanged (out of scope unless discovery marks mismatch)
deviations: Palette uses earthy Aegis-adjacent hex fills per t090_world_object_glyphs.md — not 1:1 Reforger UI color match
24×24 viewBox north-up simple fills — no embedded bitmaps
